title: Fix stale-reference bugs: deleted-preview upload 404 + stale card poster/thumb
description: Two confirmed stale-reference bugs. (1) HIGH: deleting a preview card while a generation sourced from it is in flight strands the start-frame — _uploadImage fetches the deleted /project-file source and 404s, crashing the gen with a raw GitHub-report dialog. Fix: fail soft with a friendly ui:error. (2) Stale card paint: /project-file URLs carry no version token, so an in-place file overwrite (video poster <id>.thumb.jpg on preview->final replace) keeps the same URL -> same-URL guard + browser cache serve stale bytes. Fix: server-stamp &v=<mtime> onto filePath/thumbPath in save-generation. Root cause diagnosed + confirmed on disk (Chroma project) and app.log.
